goal: compose[T, U, V](e.map, h.map) = compose[T, U, V](e.map, k.map)
compose[T, U, V](h.map, e.map) = compose[T, U, V](k.map, e.map)
compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k).map
compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k).map = (h = k)
proof: compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h).map or k = h
compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k).map != compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h).map
compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h).map

goal: compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e).map
compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e).map = (h = k)
proof: compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e).map or k = h
compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e).map != compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e).map
compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e).map

goal: compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k).map
proof: compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k) != compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h)

goal: compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e).map
proof: compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e) != compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e)
compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k) != compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h)

goal: compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k)
compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k) = (h = k)

proof: compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e) != compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e)

goal: compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e)
compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e) = (h = k)
inverse_bijection[U, T](inverse_bijection[T, U](e)) = inverse_bijection[U, T](inverse_bijection[T, U](h))
compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, c) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, d)
compose_bijection[U, W, T](c, compose_bijection[U, V, W](a, b)) = compose_bijection[U, W, T](d, compose_bijection[U, V, W](a, b))
